name: @elixio/mobile
_react_version_note: Mobile declares react@19 (Expo SDK 56 minimum), but root pnpm.overrides pins the whole monorepo to react@18.3.1 because Next.js 14.x requires React 18 and the web app is live. See ../../docs/PHASE-2-UPGRADE.md for the React 19 + Next 15 + Expo 57 migration plan.
_typescript_version_note: Mobile was on TS 6.0.3 (bleeding edge). Now aligned to TS 5.9.3 via root pnpm.overrides for monorepo consistency. See ../../docs/PHASE-2-UPGRADE.md for the TS 6 migration plan.
